title: Friday Jazz at the High Museum
location: High Museum of Art, 1280 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Live jazz in one of Atlanta's most iconic art museums. This month features Rafael Pereira and friends with two musical areas playing layered improv. Enjoy drinks, light bites, and docent-led gallery tours. Perfect date night — art, music, and atmosphere in one evening.

title: Lila Iké with special guests
location: The Loft at The Masquerade, 1374 West Peachtree St NW, Atlanta
description: Jamaican reggae sensation Lila Iké brings her captivating voice and modern reggae sound to Atlanta. One of the most talked-about reggae artists today — intimate venue, great energy, perfect for couples who love island music and good vibes.

title: 40th Annual Sweet Auburn Springfest
description: Atlanta's largest free multicultural outdoor festival celebrating its 40th anniversary. Live music, diverse food vendors, art, culture, and community. Great for couples who want a full day of exploration — multicultural, lively, and budget-friendly.

title: HANGEO Thursdays: Salsa & Bachata Night
description: Weekly Latin dance social with Salsa and Bachata. Beginner-friendly atmosphere with instruction before the social dancing begins. Mingle, learn together, and enjoy a night of dance. Great way for couples to connect physically and have fun.

title: AfroVibez 2026: 5th Annual Africa Day Celebration
description: Celebrate African heritage at this vibrant event. Dress code: Red, Yellow, or Green — colors representing unity, freedom, and pride in African heritage. Great cultural date for couples interested in music, food, and African diaspora culture.

title: Latin Wednesdays at Tongue & Groove
location: Tongue & Groove, 950 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Weekly Latin dance night at one of Atlanta's most popular dance venues. Salsa, Bachata, Merengue and more. Great energy, good crowd, no pressure — perfect for couples who want a low-key but fun night out dancing.

title: Comedy & Candles Rooftop Night at REVERB Hotel
description: "Love In The Dark" rooftop comedy experience. Candlelit setting, craft cocktails, and stand-up comedy — a uniquely romantic date night format. Intimate vibes on a rooftop in the heart of Atlanta.

title: Bachata Tuesdays at Academy Ballroom
location: Academy Ballroom, 3750 Cambellton Rd SW, Atlanta
description: Weekly Bachata social dancing night in Atlanta's historic southwest district. Social dancing from 8:30 PM with Bachata music all night. Good for couples who enjoy dancing or want to learn a new style together.

title: Vegan & Friends Weekly Meetup
description: Atlanta's weekly vegan community meetup every Wednesday night. Vibrant community of plant-based food lovers. Great for couples exploring vegan/vegetarian food scene together — brings together food vendors, music, and good energy.

title: Helium Comedy Club: Martin Amini
location: Helium Comedy Club, 1157 Euclid Ave NE, Atlanta
description: Stand-up comedy with Martin Amini at Atlanta's premier comedy club. Great date night — laughter is a proven connection booster. Multiple shows on Saturday so you can choose early or late show.
